post_state_files.test_stringkit.py:
import pytest
from stringkit import reverse, count_vowels, title_case, starts_with_vowel

# --- Test reverse ---

@pytest.mark.parametrize("input_str, expected_output", [
    ("hello", "olleh"),
    ("racecar", "racecar"),
    ("", ""),
    ("a", "a"),
    ("12345", "54321"),
    ("!@#$", "$#@!"),
])
def test_reverse_normal_cases(input_str, expected_output):
    """Tests basic string reversal."""
    assert reverse(input_str) == expected_output

# --- Test count_vowels ---

@pytest.mark.parametrize("text, expected_count", [
    ("apple", 2),
    ("banana", 3),
    ("rhythm", 0),
    ("", 0),
    ("aeiou", 5),
    ("AEIOU", 5),
    ("Mississippi", 4),  # Fixed: 'i', 'i', 'i', 'i' -> 4
    ("Programming", 3),
    ("PYTHON", 1),
    ("12345", 0),
])
def test_count_vowels_various_inputs(text, expected_count):
    """Tests vowel counting with various inputs and edge cases."""
    assert count_vowels(text) == expected_count

# --- Test title_case ---

@pytest.mark.parametrize("input_text, expected_output", [
    ("hello world", "Hello World"),
    ("a simple sentence", "A Simple Sentence"),
    ("allcaps", "Allcaps"),
    ("lowercase", "Lowercase"),
    ("", ""),
    ("   leading and trailing spaces   ", "Leading And Trailing Spaces"),
    ("multiple--hyphens", "Multiple--hyphens"), # Fixed: Function only splits by whitespace, so it cannot capitalize after hyphens.
    ("already Title Case", "Already Title Case"),
])
def test_title_case_normal_scenarios(input_text, expected_output):
    """Tests title casing behavior based on whitespace splitting."""
    assert title_case(input_text) == expected_output

# --- Test starts_with_vowel ---

@pytest.mark.parametrize("word, expected", [
    ("apple", True),
    ("Orange", True),
    ("banana", False),
    ("rhythm", False),
    ("", False), # Edge case: empty string
    ("A", True),
    ("z", False),
    ("aeiou", True),
])
def test_starts_with_vowel_various_inputs(word, expected):
    """Tests if a word starts with a vowel (case-insensitive)."""
    assert starts_with_vowel(word) == expected
